# sunnyBags

## about

This is a side project aimed to create a page to showcase diy hand bags.
It should show a gallery of bags, and when clicked on one bag, you can see more information about it.

## specs

every bag has meta information, like:

- id
- name
- category
- describtion
- front and back photos
- fabric
- size
- price
- discount in %
- bg color? (if thumbnails are png, we can custimize backgrounds)

## suggested tech stack generated by AI

this is just for inspo here until tech stack is decided by humans

### Frontend:

- Framework: React (for a responsive, interactive UI)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS (quick customization, ideal for your bag thumbnails with background colors)
- Image Handling: Cloudinary or Firebase for optimized image storage and display

### Backend:

- Framework: Node.js with Express (efficient for handling product information requests)
- Database: MongoDB (NoSQL, ideal for structured but flexible bag data with various fields)

### Hosting:

- Platform: Vercel or Netlify (simple, frontend-friendly for React; integrates well with GitHub)

### Additional Tools:

Admin Panel: Strapi (or another headless CMS) to manage bag details easily
Version Control: GitHub (for collaborative and version control)
